_publications._publicationTitle: Analysis of muscle tissue in vivo using fiber-optic autofluorescence and diffuse reflectance spectroscopy.

_contextSnippet: skeletal muscles (Quad, Gastr, and TA) were less separable with AUCs ranging between 0.79 and 0.99. AUC = 1 for cardiac muscle
details: QDC classifier achieved AUCs ranging from 0.79-0.99 for skeletal muscle classification and AUC=1 for cardiac muscle separation
